channel.title: Application-Server on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Application-Server on Pi Stack

item.title: Nginx Unit vs Gunicorn vs Caddy: Best Self-Hosted Application Server 2026
item.description: An application server is the layer that executes your web application code — handling HTTP requests, running your business logic, and returning responses. While traditional web servers like Nginx or Apache serve static files and proxy to separate application processes, an application server runs your code directly, eliminating the proxy overhead and simplifying your stack.
